title: RiskLevelTypeValues
description:
Borrower presents moderate risk but still acceptable.

Comment:
Example
Small business loan with stable but fluctuating income.

x-enumeration-literals.name: High
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Borrower has high likelihood of default or financial instability.

Comment:
Examples
Borrower with high debt obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Low
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Borrower has strong financial stability and low probability of default.

Comment
Examples
Customer with excellent credit score and stable income.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Very High
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Extremely high risk; credit approval is unlikely.

Comment:
Example
Borrower with previous loan defaults.
